hero.title: Kujoina IATF
hero.lead: Nhengo yakavhurika. Kune nzira dzakawanda dzekutora chikamu, kunyangwe iwe uchivimba nehunyanzvi hwekubatsira, kuvaka software inowanikwa, kushandura, kuyedza, kana kuchengetedza chirongwa. Nhaurirano uye zvisarudzo zvinoitika paruzhinji paGitHub neDiscord.

items: Kumbira basa. Kana ukasangana nechipingamupinyi chokugona kuwana chinogona kugadziriswa nesoftware yepachena yakavhurika, chiendese kuburikidza nechikumbiro chekugamuchira.
Ongorora uye ongorora. Edza IATF mapurojekiti netekinoroji yekubatsira yaunoshandisa, taura zvinoshanda nezvisingashande, uye faira zvinetso zvakananga pane repository rakakodzera.
Shandura. Zvinyorwa zvepakutanga zvinotanga kubudiswa mumutauro weChirungu. Shanduro dzinowedzerwa sezvo vanyori varipo, kutanga neSpanish.
Kuvaka. Tora zvinetso muIATF repository ipi neipi, tumira zvikumbiro zvekudhonza, kana kutora purojekiti seinjiniya wayo ane mutoro.
Chengeta. Zvirongwa zviripo dzimwe nguva zvinoda mutarisiri mutsva. Kutenderera kwevatarisiri chikamu chakajairika chemuenzaniso, kwete kusarudzika.
GitHub. Nhau, kudhonza zvikumbiro, kubudiswa, uye zvinyorwa zvepurojekiti.
Kusawirirana. Kurukurirano mhenyu, kuronga, uye mibvunzo isina kurongwa.
Tumira tsamba dzepaIndaneti. Kushandisa contact@iatf.cc kana GitHub kana kuti Discord zvikasashanda.

header.title: Sarudza chiteshi chinowirirana nemashandiro aunoda kuita

paragraphs: Nhepfenyuro dzose dzinopinda muongororo imwe chete yeruzhinji uye mudura rimwe chete reruzhinji.
